title: Define CommonProject contract foundation
goal: Add the machine-readable commonworld catalog contract, seed examples, validation tests, and minimal CI so later UI work has a stable data shape.

acceptance.assertion: contracts/commonworld/project.schema.json defines CommonProject with sphere, aspects, provenance, curation and optional handoff fields.
Aspect entries require label, color token, icon token, weight, confidence and evidence; color is not the only semantic carrier.
At least two curated seed project examples validate against the schemas.
The repository has a minimal validation command or CI path for contract examples.
